title: ecbolium anagalloides
intro: Ecbolium anagalloides, also known as the hairy ecbolium, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Ecbolium anagalloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
